element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Earned through point accumulation; up to 6 total upgrades available
Constant forward momentum requirement; slowing damages ship
One unique boss per level; escalates in difficulty

typical_tension_triggers: Maintaining forward momentum while avoiding attacks
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Rail-based constant forward momentum with episodic boss climaxes; tension builds toward each level's end boss then releases upon completion

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory; establishes shooting and movement mechanics with moderate enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive increase in enemy patterns and boss complexity; ship upgrades help balance challenge
difficulty_curve.late_game: Significant difficulty spike in final levels; boss encounters become pattern-heavy and demanding
notable_spikes: Boss encounters at each level's end
Final levels (7-8) feature complex boss patterns

notable_level_patterns.description: Area 1 (US/EU) or Area 3 (JP) features tessellation of flashing tetrominoes resembling Tetris blocks; off-track landscape decoration
Each level employs distinct visual perspective using Mode 7 capability; inspired by 2001: A Space Odyssey 'Star Gate' sequence
Boss in Area 3 resembles SNES controller with four-color button elements; aesthetic reinforcement of platform identity
